electroacoustic.frequency_range_note: Usable bandwidth -10 dB with [KARA II 70] preset; -10 dB low-cut extends to 85 Hz on the short-throw [KARA II_FI] preset
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, [KARA II 70] preset
electroacoustic.directivity: Horizontal: Panflex/L-Fins selectable 70 or 110 symmetric, or 90 asymmetric (35/55 or 55/35); 70 setting adds ~2 dB on-axis gain above 1 kHz vs 110. Vertical: variable, set by number of elements and array curvature (WST line source)
electroacoustic.components: LF: 2 x 8-inch neodymium cone drivers (bass-reflex loaded); HF: 1 x 3-inch neodymium diaphragm compression driver on DOSC waveguide with L-Fins

operating_modes: 2-way active: one amp channel drives LF, one drives HF
Low-latency mode for [KARA II_MO] monitor use: 1.18 ms on LA7.16i, 0.84 ms on LA2Xi/LA4X/LA12X
amplification.preset_note: Each horizontal directivity setting requires its matching preset (70/90/110). [KARA II_FI] is a flat short-throw fill preset optimized for the 110 fins setting; [KARA II_MO] is the stage-monitor preset (also 110-optimized) and supports the low-latency operating mode.

connection.breakouts: Multi-enclosure cabling via DOFILL-LA8 (8-point PA-COM to 2x 4-point speakON) or DO3WFILL (one 2-way active + two passive); SP-Y1 splits a 4-point speakON to 2x 2-point speakON

physical.dimensions_mm: 733 W x 162 H x 482 D (front face); rear depth ~500 mm including handles per datasheet
physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic birch plywood; coated steel front grille with acoustically neutral 3D fabric; high-grade steel rigging with anti-corrosion coating; Pantone 426 C dark grey-brown finish

deployment.max_per_flown_array: 16 elements at safe limit / 24 at maximum limit (M-BUMP + optional M-BAR); 6 with KARA-MINIBU

usage: Long-throw variable-curvature line source for the K Series, suited to throws beyond ~35 m in performing arts, houses of worship, large corporate and special events where tight vertical control matters.
Each Kara II is a 2-way active box needing 2 amp channels (LF + HF); plan amp counts at 6 boxes per LA12X, 8 per LA7.16(i), 4 per LA4X, and 4 per LA2Xi SE.
Use Panflex to mix directivity within one hang (70/90/110) to even out horizontal SPL mapping; the 70 setting trades width for roughly 2 dB more reach above 1 kHz.
Match the preset to the fins: [KARA II 70/90/110] for the directivity in use, [KARA II_FI] for flat short-throw fills, and [KARA II_MO] for stage-monitor duty with the available low-latency mode.
Extend the low end by pairing with KS28, SB18, or KS21 subs; observe the preset-defined acoustic-center spacing (e.g. 2.8 m for a 60 Hz crossover, 1.7 m for 100 Hz) for clean coupling.

Flying caps at 16 elements (safe) / 24 (max) on M-BUMP; the IP55 rating and birch enclosure suit touring and limited outdoor exposure, but always model the rig in Soundvision to verify mechanical safety.
